'''Abregado-dai''' was the innermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] from the [[Star/Legends|sun]] [[Anza/Legends|Anza]] of the [[Abregado system/Legends|Abregado system]] within<ref name="CCW" /> the [[Southern Core]] portion<ref name="Region" /> of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] region. Located at the head of the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]] like the rest of the system, it was a [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] planet without any [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="CCW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Abregado-dai was first mentioned in the [[2003]] sourcebook ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[Wizards of the Coast]].<ref name="CCW" />
